---
title: "atomic_gpt.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\atomic_gpt.py"
loc: 196
complexity: 12
logic_score: 2.27
style_score: 3.68
intel_score: 7.52
overall_score: 3.67
---

## Intent
The `atomic_gpt.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on WardenCircuitBreaker, BaseWarden, __init__, train, eval, sigmoid, relu, _normalize, get_lore_alignment, forward, AnomalyWarden, __init__, forward, train_step, log_anomaly, save, load, SessionWarden, __init__, forward, train_step, save, load, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via WardenCircuitBreaker, BaseWarden, __init__, train, eval, sigmoid, relu, _normalize, get_lore_alignment, forward, AnomalyWarden, __init__, forward, train_step, log_anomaly, save, load, SessionWarden, __init__, forward, train_step, save, load, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 36 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pickle](file://pickle)
- [json](file://json)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.mimir_client](file://src.core.mimir_client)
- [src.core.utils](file://src.core.utils)
- [argparse](file://argparse)

### Exports
- `WardenCircuitBreaker`
- `BaseWarden`
- `__init__`
- `train`
- `eval`
- `sigmoid`
- `relu`
- `_normalize`
- `get_lore_alignment`
- `forward`
- `AnomalyWarden`
- `__init__`
- `forward`
- `train_step`
- `log_anomaly`
- `save`
- `load`
- `SessionWarden`
- `__init__`
- `forward`
- `train_step`
- `save`
- `load`
- `main`
